checks.detail: PlanningInput accepts critical nodes, policy exclusions, available barrier inventory, and config budgets
planner synthesizes composition firewall, sandbox escalation, staged rollout, and supplied verified fork pin candidates
PlannedBarrier carries BarrierRationale with metric, value, risk reduction, cost, and overhead
excluded nodes are skipped and recorded with DGIS-IMMUNE-003 events
candidate enumeration enforces max_total_overhead_ms and max_barriers_per_plan
NoFeasiblePlan is returned when constraints cannot reduce cascade loss below target
plan_incremental scopes work to changed nodes and emits IncrementalReplanSummary
Cargo test target dgis_immunization_planner points at tests/security/dgis_immunization_planner.rs

validation.command: CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/franken_node-snowybeaver-bd2fid-target rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test dgis_immunization_planner --no-default-features -- --nocapture
